Plaintiff'S Motion To Lift The Stay On This Action
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Margaux Gundzik, Esq., 818 795 5705, Lawyers for Justice, m.gundzik@calljustice.com for Plaintiff.
Charles Cavanagh, Esq. 303.454.2144, Messner Reeves LLP for Defendant Urban Alchemy.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court calls Line 7 (594378)and Line 8 (5995421)simultaneously. Ms. Gundzik argues. Mr. Cavanagh responds the final approval hearing is set for July. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling on Lines 7 and 8 and rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS OCTAVIO REYES, LINTON NICHOLSON'S Motion to lift stay.

"Plaintiffs' motion to lift the stay on this action" is denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Continued To Oct-05-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARGAUX GUNDZIK, Esq. of Lawyers for Justice, PC (Tel: 818-265-1020) for plaintiff;
Atty. CHARLES C. CAVANAGH, Esq. of Messner Reeves LLP (Tel: 303-623-1800) for defendant Urban Alchemy.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT URBAN ALCHEMY's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer or motion to abate is granted. The court exercises its inherent powers pursuant to CCP 128(a)(3) to stay this action. This action factually and legally significantly overlaps with the putative class action/PAGA action in case CGC-20-588622 ("Neutall"). A stay will preserve judicial and party resources and avoid the possibility of inconsistent judgments. The Neutall action is in the process of settling. (Supp. Cavanaugh Decl., pars. 1-3.) Therefore, that litigation should be resolved shortly and the stay should be brief.

Plaintiff's request for consolidation is not properly before the court.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To Jun-01-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Defendant Urban Alchemys Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Enforcement Under The Private Attorneys General Act
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT URBAN ALCHEMY'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Enforcement Under The Private Attorneys General Act.

Defendant's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Code Civ. Proc. section 430.41, which requires counsel to meet and confer in person or by telephone before a demurrer is filed. Counsel Charles Cavanagh's declaration fails to specify "the means by which" he met and conferred with counsel for Plaintiffs. All counsel are ordered to comply with Code Civ. Proc. sec. 430.41. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by March 9, 2022.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)
